notes: Prospects uses only Architect-prepared participant JSON values.
All obsolete direct table access, table-ID configuration, fallback code, and the unused legacy Prospect JavaScript file were removed.
Participant Config status no longer expects obsolete Prospect source identifiers.
No Hold/Resume, ChatMonitor, transfer, duplicate-control, Prospect submission, or wrap-up business logic changed.
